metadata.source: User-provided CSV file placed in datasets/numerical/

target_transform_decision.reason: Target is strongly skewed and eligible for log1p testing.

final_target_transform.reason: Target skewness was high enough for testing log1p, but validation RMSE did not improve, so the original target scale was kept.

hyperparameters.learning_rate: Not applicable: closed-form ordinary least squares
hyperparameters.optimizer: Not applicable: scikit-learn LinearRegression uses least-squares optimization

hyperparameters.selection_reason: Validation RMSE favored KNN on the original target scale.

metadata.source: User-provided image folders placed in datasets/images/

hyperparameters.regularization: L2 regularization with tuned C value
hyperparameters.epochs: Not applicable: max_iter controls solver iterations
